eligibility_rule_rows.reading: Offensive region remains usable only if no local veto neighborhood or transition-band warning is active.
Use as an eligibility support bundle, not as standalone authorization.

entry_veto_rows.reading: Do not open new exposure when local neighborhood looks like this diffusion risk pocket.
Do not open new exposure when local neighborhood looks like this diffusion risk pocket.
Do not open new exposure when local neighborhood looks like this diffusion risk pocket.
Do not open new exposure when local neighborhood looks like this diffusion risk pocket.

holding_veto_rows.reading: This is a de-risk / holding-veto object, not a blanket entry prohibition.
This is a de-risk / holding-veto object, not a blanket entry prohibition.

risk_off_override_rows.trigger_reason: veto neighborhoods are densely concentrated in diffusion extensions and bridge roles
risk_off_override_rows.reading: Shrink new risk expression when diffusion extension pockets dominate the local risk map.

risk_off_override_rows.trigger_reason: core transition bands indicate rising holding instability in the core continuation path
risk_off_override_rows.reading: Prefer de-risking or shorter holding half-life when core transition instability is active.

risk_off_override_rows.trigger_reason: selector candidates overlap with identified risk regions
risk_off_override_rows.reading: Do not let selector strength automatically override mapped risk regions.

interpretation: V1.12BT treats dangerous regions as first-class control objects instead of waiting for a clean bad cluster that may never naturally appear.
The extraction deliberately separates entry veto, holding veto, and risk-off override so that the system does not collapse back into one blunt global gate.
